title: hieracium carolinianum f. pinetorum
intro: Hieracium carolinianum f. pinetorum, also known as the Carolina hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium carolinianum f. pinetorum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
